bet_results.closing_context: Live total inflated as high as 223.5 during 3Q control state; pregame/live entry captured +13.5 points of result margin versus line.
Harris had 5 rebounds by late 3Q but played only 1:06 in Q4 due to blowout compression; final minutes 22:37.

CLE.Jarrett Allen: 23 PTS, 7 REB, 8-14 FG; paint pressure and foul generation broke DET interior.
CLE.Evan Mobley: 21 PTS, 12 REB, 6 AST, 2 STL, 2 BLK, +31; two-way stabilizer.
CLE.Sam Merrill: 23 PTS, 5-8 3PT, +22; bench spacing burst changed game geometry.
CLE.James Harden: 9 PTS, 5 REB, 6 AST, +31 despite poor shooting; orchestration and control-state value.

DET.Cade Cunningham: 13 PTS, 4 REB, 5 AST, 5-16 FG, 0-7 3PT, -32; primary engine suppressed.
DET.Tobias Harris: 5 PTS, 5 REB, 0-6 FG, 22:37; rebound prop killed by blowout minutes compression.
DET.Jalen Duren: 7 PTS, 9 REB, 5 PF; foul trouble limited ceiling but still productive on glass.
DET.Daniss Jenkins: 17 PTS, 3 REB, 5 AST; late scoring helped total but not comeback.
DET.Duncan Robinson: 13 PTS, 3-5 3PT; spacing contribution not enough to offset defensive collapse.

phase_1_game_flow.opening_phase: CLE opened 31-22 behind efficient interior touches and early 3PT shotmaking. DET generated some offensive glass but missed early paint/wing chances.
phase_1_game_flow.middle_phase: CLE extended to 64-47 by halftime. Allen, Mobley, Merrill and Mitchell punished DET fouls, turnovers and weak halfcourt defense.
phase_1_game_flow.separation_phase: Q3 was the game-breaker: CLE won it 35-26, reached 99-73 after three, and forced the model into control-state/blowout volatility mode.
phase_1_game_flow.closing_phase: Q4 became garbage-time compression. CLE still won the quarter 26-21 while DET shot only 23.8% in the period.

phase_2_pivotal_moments: Sam Merrill bench burst gave CLE spacing and kept DET from loading up on Mitchell/Harden actions.
Jarrett Allen free-throw and rim-pressure sequence in Q2 forced DET into foul distress.
DET opened Q3 with turnovers and missed threes; CLE pushed the lead past 20 and never gave back control.
Harris checked out early in Q4 with only 5 boards, confirming rebound prop suppression.

phase_3_context_variables.officiating: High whistle environment: CLE attempted 44 FT and DET committed 31 fouls. Marc Davis crew supported physicality and free-throw volume, aiding over result but damaging DET rotation stability.
phase_3_context_variables.rebounding: CLE won total rebounds 50-41 and second-chance points 18-11. DET center/forward box-out edge did not translate under foul pressure and blowout state.
phase_3_context_variables.psychological: Detroit showed Game 7 home collapse symptoms: forced shot profile, Cade suppression, turnovers, and emotional technical/foul leakage.
phase_3_context_variables.rotation: Harris and several DET starters lost 4Q minutes due to margin. This is the core reason the Tobias rebound over failed despite being live through 3Q.

phase_4_model_relevance.total_model: Correct directional call. The over was supported by foul volume, transition leak risk, and CLE efficiency. Final 219 cleared 205.5 by 13.5 points.
phase_4_model_relevance.rebound_model: Tobias Harris 7+ was structurally live but fragile. Model needs stronger Game 7 blowout/minutes-compression penalty on role forwards when team is trailing by 20+ entering Q4.
phase_4_model_relevance.liveflow_model: 3Q strike no-new-entry call was correct. Existing Over was protected; fresh DET TT over was rejected and DET finished only 94, validating kill-switch discipline.
patch_recommendations: Increase BLOWOUT_KILL_SWITCH weight for player rebound overs when team down 22+ late Q3.
Apply ROLE_FORWARD_MINUTES_COMPRESSION penalty when player is non-primary scorer and team enters elimination blowout.
Boost full-game totals when whistle crew + paint pressure produces 60+ projected FTA environment.
Track bench-spacing burst tag for Sam Merrill-style shooters in playoff games.

net_bet_result.notes: Over win carried the slate. Tobias 7+ missed by two rebounds due to blowout suppression.
